textByHash.203c49540391a3d7a5835f63ae8e0f4f6afa033d: Hey there. Things are much nicer around here now that the war is over.
textByHash.3021d62ff5e2c95c7f5fcdf1b571ef67fa87d296: General Hining concluded that, whatever is down there, it's not affiliated with any of the elf factions, and it should be left alone.
textByHash.404a1155c4440fc43b8cb2e193643b0223f6dbea: Sorry, can't stop to talk. You should go to General Hining if you need something.
textByHash.4b6601f37c243fb4f263ce25bd7567b90491ea43: I keep seeing rabbits in this forest. What I wouldn't give to eat one, but I'm not quick enough to kill any and I'm no good with a bow.
textByHash.72827870509b8d95afc4622cb47ee818291627eb: I was just wondering what I was doing here too. I'm meant to be looking after this catapult but I can't keep my mind on the job. We've been living off field rations for almost a year now.
textByHash.77cd71ef2d56f88311eef31a4348759321b8f21a: You cooked me a rabbit! Thanks a lot. You don't mind watching things while I take five to eat it, do you?
textByHash.893677b2883bf6005e358de577b92b1d11780d99: They say the king died from a flying fire ball. Are you certain no one messed with the catapult while I was eating?
textByHash.b3b8b3fea96c23b8f75545a8c2d623bf071da182: We had to drive them out, in case their condition infected the rest of the troops. Their wives will be given a full widow pension when we return home.
textByHash.c53c4c8f9857423fad132b53b4e86eb922d8232d: Then suddenly they returned, with a wild gleam in their eyes, raving about gods and snakes and all kinds of madness.
textByHash.d797126cc659a5c71d9b4122615952530251d200: No. We sent a scouting party in that direction, when we first established our camp. Some of the men got lost in the swamps. Eventually we listed them as dead.
textByHash.fba81298ee8251511e771bf12225ec887089ae56: I see you making friends with that elf, traitor!
textByHash.fc45b9c436325d3be28de5a7c1dd52b5c106a11a: Sorry, I shouldn't give out sensitive information to civilians. You should go to General Hining, in the camp along the road.
